rulings.Case Title: HARRY R. MCRICE et al VS. A. W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant T H Agriculture Nutrition, Llc For An Order For Deemed Admissions And Mandatory Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,630.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, DECEMBER 26, 2006, LINE 1. DEFENDANT TH AGRICULTURE & NUTRITION, LLC.'s Motion for an Order Deemed Admissions and Mandatory Sanctions in the Amount of $2,630.00 off calendar. Please call and calendar in Discovery Department. See San Francisco Local Rule 10(A)(1)(a). =(302/PHA/ju)

rulings.Case Title: GLENNA WHINERY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Jim Whinery As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, DECEMBER 26, 2006, LINE 2. PLAINTIFF GLENNA WHINERY, JIM WHINERY'S Motion to Appoint Jim Whinery as Successor-In-Interest to, and Substitute Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff and, for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is granted, no opposition filed. =(302/PHA/ju)
